fields.name: BNO055_CHIP_ID
fields.description: Chip identification code, read-only fixed value 0xA0

fields.name: ACC_CHIP_ID
fields.description: Chip ID of the Accelerometer device, read-only fixed value 0xFB

fields.name: MAG_CHIP_ID
fields.description: Chip ID of the Magnetometer device, read-only fixed value 0x32

fields.name: GYRO_CHIP_ID
fields.description: Chip ID of the Gyroscope device, read-only fixed value 0x0F

fields.name: SW_REVISION_ID
fields.description: Lower byte of SW Revision ID, read-only fixed value depending on SW revision

fields.name: SW_REVISION_ID
fields.description: Upper byte of SW Revision ID <15:8>

fields.name: SLP_DURATION
fields.description: Sleep duration for accelerometer low power mode

fields.name: ACCELERATION_DATA_X
fields.description: Upper byte of X axis Acceleration data <15:8>

fields.name: ACCELERATION_DATA_Y
fields.description: Lower byte of Y axis Acceleration data <7:0>

fields.name: GYR_POWER_MODE
fields.description: GYR_Power_Mode <2:0> Read: current selected power mode Write: can only be changed in sensor mode, see section 3.5.3

fields.name: ACC_BSX_DRDY
fields.description: Accelerometer Bosch data ready interrupt mask

Interrupt.name: MAG_DATA_X_MSB
Interrupt.description: Upper byte of X axis magnetometer data

fields.name: ACC_BSX_DRDY
fields.description: Accelerometer Bosch data ready interrupt enable

Interrupt.name: MAG_DATA_Y_LSB
Interrupt.description: Lower byte of Y axis Magnetometer data

Accel_Interrupt.name: MAG_DATA_Y_MSB
Accel_Interrupt.description: Upper byte of Y axis Magnetometer data

fields.name: HG_Z_AXIS
fields.description: Select Z axis for high-G interrupt

fields.name: HG_Y_AXIS
fields.description: Select Y axis for high-G interrupt

fields.name: HG_X_AXIS
fields.description: Select X axis for high-G interrupt

fields.name: AM_NM_Z_AXIS
fields.description: Select Z axis for any motion or no motion interrupt

fields.name: AM_NM_Y_AXIS
fields.description: Select Y axis for any motion or no motion interrupt

fields.name: AM_NM_X_AXIS
fields.description: Select X axis for any motion or no motion interrupt

Accel_Interrupt.name: MAG_DATA_Z_MSB
Accel_Interrupt.description: Upper byte of Z axis Magnetometer data

fields.name: ACC_HG_THRES
fields.description: Threshold used high-g interrupt. The threshold value is dependent on the accelerometer range selected in the ACC_Config register. 1 LSB = 7.81 mg (2-g range)^1 LSB = 15.63 mg (4-g range) 1 LSB = 31.25 mg (8-g range) 1 LSB = 62.5 mg (16-g range)

fields.name: ACC_NM_THRES
fields.description: Threshold used for the Slow motion or no motion interrupt. The threshold value is dependent on the accelerometer range selected in the ACC_Config register. 1 LSB = 3.91 mg (2-g range) 1 LSB = 7.81 mg (4-g range) 1 LSB = 15.63 mg (8-g range) 1 LSB = 31.25 mg (16-g range)

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_INT_SETTING
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope interrupt settings for high rate and any motion filters and axis enables

fields.name: HR_FILT
fields.description: '1' ('0') selects unfiltered (filtered) data for high rate interrupt

fields.name: AM_FILT
fields.description: '1' ('0') selects unfiltered (filtered) data for any motion interrupt

fields.name: HR_Z_AXIS
fields.description: 1' ('0') enables (disables) high rate interrupt for z -axis

fields.name: HR_Y_AXIS
fields.description: 1' ('0') enables (disables) high rate interrupt for y-axis

fields.name: HR_X_AXIS
fields.description: 1' ('0') enables (disables) high rate interrupt for x -axis

fields.name: AM_Z_AXIS
fields.description: 1' ('0') enables (disables) any motion interrupt for z -axis

fields.name: AM_Y_AXIS
fields.description: 1' ('0') enables (disables) any motion interrupt for y-axis

fields.name: AM_X_AXIS
fields.description: 1' ('0') enables (disables) any motion interrupt for x -axis

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_HR_X_SET
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope high rate X axis threshold and hysteresis settings

fields.name: HR_X_THRES_HYST
fields.description: High rate hysteresis for X axis = (255 + 256 * HR_X_THRES_HYST) *4 LSB

fields.name: HR_X_THRESHOLD
fields.description: High rate threshold for gyroscope X axis. 1 LSB = 62.5°/s in 2000°/s-range

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_DUR_X
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope high rate X duration setting

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_HR_Y_SET
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope high rate Y axis threshold and hysteresis settings

fields.name: HR_Y_THRES_HYST
fields.description: High rate hysteresis for Y axis = (255 + 256 * HR_Y_THRES_HYST) *4 LSB

fields.name: HR_Y_THRESHOLD
fields.description: High rate threshold for gyroscope Y axis. 1 LSB = 62.5°/s in 2000°/s-range

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_DUR_Y
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope high rate Y duration setting

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_HR_Z_SET
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope high rate Z axis threshold and hysteresis settings

fields.name: HR_Z_THRES_HYST
fields.description: High rate hysteresis for Z axis = (255 + 256 * HR_Z_THRES_HYST) *4 LSB

fields.name: HR_Z_THRESHOLD
fields.description: High rate threshold for gyroscope Z axis. 1 LSB = 62.5°/s in 2000°/s-range

Gyro_Interrupt.name: GYR_DUR_Z
Gyro_Interrupt.description: Gyroscope Z-axis high rate duration register

fields.name: GYRO_ANY_MOTION_THRES
fields.description: Any motion threshold for gyroscope interrupt. 1 LSB = 1 °/s in 2000°/s-range

fields.name: AWAKE_DURATION
fields.description: Awake duration: 0=8 samples, 1=16 samples, 2=32 samples, 3=64 samples

fields.name: SLOPE_SAMPLES
fields.description: Any motion interrupt triggers if [Slope Samples + 1]*4 consecutive data points above threshold

fields.name: GRAVITY_VECTOR_DATA_X_7_0

System Control.name: CALIB_STAT
System Control.description: Calibration status register for system, gyro, accel, and mag

fields.name: SYS_CALIB_STATUS
fields.description: Current system calibration status. Read: 3 indicates fully calibrated; 0 indicates not calibrated

fields.name: GYR_CALIB_STATUS
fields.description: Current offset calibration status of Gyroscope. Read: 3 indicates fully calibrated; 0 indicates not calibrated

fields.name: ACC_CALIB_STATUS
fields.description: Current offset calibration status of Accelerometer. Read: 3 indicates fully calibrated; 0 indicates not calibrated

fields.name: MAG_CALIB_STATUS
fields.description: Current offset calibration status of Magnetometer. Read: 3 indicates fully calibrated; 0 indicates not calibrated

fields.name: ST_MCU
fields.description: Microcontroller self-test result. Read: 1 indicates test passed; 0 indicates test failed

fields.name: ST_GYR
fields.description: Gyroscope self-test result. Read: 1 indicates test passed; 0 indicates test failed

fields.name: ST_MAG
fields.description: Magnetometer self-test result. Read: 1 indicates test passed; 0 indicates test failed

fields.name: ST_ACC
fields.description: Accelerometer self-test result. Read: 1 indicates test passed; 0 indicates test failed

fields.name: ACC_NM
fields.description: Status of Accelerometer no motion or slow motion interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: ACC_AM
fields.description: Status of Accelerometer any motion interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: ACC_HIGH_G
fields.description: Status of Accelerometer high-g interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: GYR_DRDY
fields.description: Status of gyroscope data ready interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: GYR_HIGH_RATE
fields.description: Status of gyroscope high rate interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: GYRO_AM
fields.description: Status of gyroscope any motion interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: MAG_DRDY
fields.description: Status of magnetometer data ready interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: ACC_BSX_DRDY
fields.description: Status of Accelerometer/BSX data ready interrupt. Read: 1 indicates interrupt triggered

fields.name: ST_MAIN_CLK
fields.description: 0 = Free to configure the CLK SRC (External or Internal), 1 = in Configuration state

fields.name: System Status Code
fields.description: Read: 0 System idle, 1 System Error, 2 Initializing peripherals 3 System Initialization 4 Executing selftest, 5 Sensor fusion algorithm running, 6 System running without fusion algorithm

fields.name: OPERATION_MODE
fields.description: Operation Mode <3:0>: See Table 3-5 for details

fields.name: POWER_MODE
fields.description: Power Mode <1:0>: See Table 3-1 for details

fields.name: CLK_SEL
fields.description: 0: Use internal oscillator 1: Use external oscillator. Set this bit only if external crystal is connected

fields.name: RST_INT
fields.description: Set to reset all interrupt status bits, and INT output

fields.name: REMAP_Z
fields.description: Remapped Z axis value. See section 3.4 for details

fields.name: REMAP_Y
fields.description: Remapped Y axis value. See section 3.4 for details

fields.name: REMAP_X
fields.description: Remapped X axis value. See section 3.4 for details

fields.name: REMAP_X_SIGN
fields.description: Remapped X axis sign. See section 3.4 for details

fields.name: REMAP_Y_SIGN
fields.description: Remapped Y axis sign. See section 3.4 for details

fields.name: REMAP_Z_SIGN
fields.description: Remapped Z axis sign. See section 3.4 for details

Soft Iron Correction Matrix.name: SIC_MATRIX_LSB0
Soft Iron Correction Matrix.description: Soft iron correction matrix LSB 0 register

Soft Iron Correction Matrix.name: SIC_MATRIX_MSB0
Soft Iron Correction Matrix.description: Soft iron correction matrix MSB 0 register

Soft Iron Correction Matrix.name: SIC_MATRIX_LSB1
Soft Iron Correction Matrix.description: Soft iron correction matrix LSB 1 register

Soft Iron Correction Matrix.name: SIC_MATRIX_MSB1
Soft Iron Correction Matrix.description: Soft iron correction matrix MSB 1 register

Soft Iron Correction Matrix.name: SIC_MATRIX_LSB2
Soft Iron Correction Matrix.description: Soft iron correction matrix LSB 2 register

Data Output.name: GRV_DATA_Z_MSB
Data Output.description: Gravity vector data Z upper byte

fields.name: GRV_DATA_Z
fields.description: Upper byte of Z axis Gravity Vector data

fields.name: SLO_NO_MOT_DUR
fields.description: Function depends on whether the slow-motion or no-motion interrupt function has been selected. If the slow- motion interrupt function has been enabled (SMNM = '0') then [slo_no_mot_dur<1:0>+1] consecutive slope data points must be above the slow/no-motion threshold (ACC_NM_THRES) for the slow-/no-motion interrupt to trigger. If the no-motion interrupt function has been enabled (SMNM = '1') then slo_no_motion_dur<5:0> defines the time for which no slope data points must exceed the slow/no-motion threshold (ACC_NM_THRES) for the slow/no-motion interrupt to trigger. The delay time in seconds may be calculated according with the following equation: slo_no_mot_dur<5:4>='b00' → [slo_no_mot_dur<3:0> + 1] slo_no_mot_dur<5:4>='b01' → [slo_no_mot_dur<3:0> * 4 + 20] slo_no_mot_dur<5>='1' → [slo_no_mot_dur<4:0> * 8 + 88]

fields.name: SMNM
fields.description: Select slow motion or no motion interrupt 0: Slow motion; 1: No motion
